nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne was born in 1528, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Charles Stearne about 1548, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne est née en 1528, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Charles Stearne environ 1548, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne wurde 1528 in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1548 in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Charles Stearne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne è nata il nel 1528 nel Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Charles Stearne circa 1548, nel Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne(은)는 1528년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에서 Charles Stearne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne nasceu em 1528, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Charles Stearne aproximadamente 1548, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne родилась в 1528 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Stearne около 1548 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Charles Stearne nació en 1528, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Charles Stearne aproximadamente 1548, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
